creator: billblake2018@gmail.com
text: I went to build a new archivemount package with a patched version of archivemount.c and discovered that sysutils/archivemount/Makefile wanted gmake, which I don't have installed.  Since I had already compiled archivemount without gmake installed, I commented out the requirement for gmake in the Makefile.  "make package" worked without incident.  So unless there's some reason to keep the gmake dependency, it should be removed.
